creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
If a find-dos2unix-files target will be implemented to create variable DOS2UNIX_FILES, the thing that I want to do will be solved, maybe.
I want to create and to update variable DOS2UNIX_FILES for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr speedy.

But, there are 39 files needed to run dos2unix in the distfile of print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr.
I don't want to write 39 paths to print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr/Makefile.

And dos2unix doesn't preserve mtime. When `make makepatch' is run, the line included date of files/patch-* files are always updated. So, I want to touch only minimal files need dos2unix.
